# rust-org0.3

## Publication status

The package is independently eligible and enabled for configured SCM COPR
publication. The canonical crates.io archive is pinned by SHA-256, fetched
directly from the immutable static registry endpoint, and includes the declared
MIT license file.

No exact `org 0.3.1` provider exists in Fedora 43, Fedora 44, Rawhide, or
matching RPM Fusion repositories. The normalized crate manifest has no external
dependencies, so publication targets all six selected chroots directly.
